name: clear-pr
description: Write PR titles and descriptions in anandyandawang's house style (used across paywithextend repos like wex-integrator and fis-integrator). Title: [EX-####] lowercase imperative summary. Body: a `## What?` section that leads with the change then the why, an optional `## Examples / Screenshots?`, and a closing `## Jira Link`. Lead with what + why, link evidence instead of inlining, backtick every code identifier, be honest about tradeoffs, and size the description to the change. Applies automatically whenever Claude opens a pull request or drafts a PR description; run /pr to draft one for the current branch.
